# Laurieville Farms

> Beekeeping apiary and woodenware manufacturer based in Michigan. 

## Business Profile
- Focus: Production of raw honey, beeswax candles, and beekeeping woodenware.
- Expertise: Building specialized beekeeping equipment (hive bodies, covers, etc.) rather than general furniture woodworking.
- Location: Michigan (Lapeer/Thumb area).

## Core Products
- [Honey & Candles](https://laurievillefarms.com/products): Raw local honey and handmade beeswax candles.
- [Beekeeping Woodenware](https://laurievillefarms.com/woodenware): Custom-built hive bodies, bottom boards, and covers.

## Contact
- Email: info@laurievillefarms.com
- Phone: (810) 47-HONEY
